slices.focus: Building a 30/60/90 day post-approval retention system
slices.summary: Built a formal retention system for approved households — 30/60/90 day intervals with named contacts per file. Shifted from treating approval as a finish line to treating it as an active support case. Plans to present it as a practice standard via a one-pager.
open_loops: Whether staff will adopt the named contact role consistently
Whether the one-pager will actually be read and used
Whether distinct interval purposes hold across varying household situations
decisions: Implement the 30/60/90 day interval schedule with distinct purposes per phase
Assign one named contact per file for accountability
Draft a one-page practice standard to socialize the system
